title: platanthera solstitialis var. brachyglossa
intro: Platanthera solstitialis var. brachyglossa, also known as the summer green orchid or lesser green orchid, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to certain parts of North America. The medicinal properties of Platanthera solstitialis var. brachyglossa include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Platanthera solstitialis var. brachyglossa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
